title: Rocket Toy Launcher for Kids, Toys for 3-12 Year Old Boys Outdoor Garden Toys Age 3 4 5 6 Garden Game Gifts for 3-12 Boys Birthday Gifts

【Perfect startup mechanism】 Children only need to step on the pump, the rocket began to shoot quickly into the sky. No battery is used, the air pressure principle is used. As children like flying, they feel the power of air pressure. The faster the jump, the higher the rocket, the children can hold a game, see which rocket is higher, let the rocket fly together!

【Child Outdoor Game】 Are you looking for a toy that promotes your child's sporty talent? This outdoor rocket toy launcher contains 6 durable bubble rockets and more powerful carrier rockets, which are highly motion and interesting, can be used on playground, lawn, garden and beach. 【Great Education Value】 This toy rocket can help children cultivate creativity, hand-eye coordination, sports knowledge and patience. It's interesting.
